base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of bowser_disaster — a character (boss) from 1989 simcity. Bowser disaster — replaces Godzilla from original PC SimCity. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Bowser disaster — replaces Godzilla from original PC SimCity; stomps buildings in SNES-exclusive easter-egg disaster. Animated walk + fire-breath
